title: Validate device_id in PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE handler
description:
Add relay-side validation of device_id in the PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE handler in relay/src/ws.rs.

What: Reject PublishKeyPackageParams where device_id is not exactly 64 lowercase hex characters.

Algorithm:
1. After deserializing params in the PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE handler
2. Check device_id.len() == 64 and device_id.chars().all(|c| matches!(c, '0'..='9' | 'a'..='f'))
3. If invalid, return a JSON-RPC error with code INVALID_REQUEST and message 'invalid device_id' — do not log the raw value
4. If valid, proceed to store.save_key_package (currently single-arg; this bead only adds validation, not the new store call — that is nie-ji7m)

Defensive rules:
- Never log the raw device_id value from the wire (log injection risk)
- Return INVALID_REQUEST (-32600) not INTERNAL_ERROR on validation failure
- Validation must precede any DB operation
acceptance_criteria: A test publishing a malformed device_id receives an error response; a valid 64-char hex device_id is accepted; cargo test -p nie-relay clean
